design.title: Project Health Dashboard
design.dashboardTitleTooltip:
DataLaVista™ Project Health Dashboard

This executive view provides comprehensive insights into cross-functional team performance, schedule variances, and overall project stability over our recent three-month cycle.

widgets.title: Project Health & Resource Tracking
widgets.textContent:
Welcome to the Project Health Dashboard

This executive view provides comprehensive insights into cross-functional team performance, schedule variances, and overall project stability over our recent three-month cycle.


Use the visualizations below to track resource allocation (Planned vs. Actual hours), identify potential bottlenecks within departmental workflows, and monitor the trajectory of our overall Project Health Score. High-risk outliers and critical-priority tasks are highlighted to facilitate quick, data-driven decision-making. Scroll to the bottom data table for granular, task-level details.

widgets.title: Task Distribution by Risk Level
widgets.widgetSql: SELECT [RiskLevel], COUNT([TaskID]) AS [__dlvy_0] FROM [dlv_active] GROUP BY [RiskLevel]

widgets.title: Planned vs. Actual Hours Over Time
widgets.widgetSql: SELECT [Date], SUM([PlannedHours]) AS [__dlvy_0], SUM([ActualHours]) AS [__dlvy_1] FROM [dlv_active] GROUP BY [Date] ORDER BY [Date] ASC

widgets.title: Open Tasks by Team
widgets.widgetSql: SELECT [Team], COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN [Status] = 'In Progress' THEN [TaskID] ELSE NULL END) AS [__dlvy_0], COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN [Status] = 'In Review' THEN [TaskID] ELSE NULL END) AS [__dlvy_1], COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN [Status] = 'To Do' THEN [TaskID] ELSE NULL END) AS [__dlvy_2] FROM [dlv_active] WHERE [Status] != 'Done' GROUP BY [Team] ORDER BY [Team] ASC

widgets.title: Task Details
widgets.widgetSql: SELECT [TaskID], [Team], [Priority], [Status], [RiskLevel], SUM([PlannedHours]) AS [PlannedHours], SUM([ActualHours]) AS [ActualHours] FROM [dlv_active] GROUP BY [TaskID], [Team], [Priority], [Status], [RiskLevel] ORDER BY [TaskID] ASC, [Team] ASC
